description_long: This is a tall, slender aluminum can with a vibrant red background and prominent white Coca-Cola branding in a classic script font. The can features a silver pull-tab top and a smooth cylindrical body. On one side, the iconic Coca-Cola logo is displayed vertically, while the opposite side shows the word 'Coke' in bold, block letters. The back of the can lists ingredients, nutritional information, and company details in small white text. The can's surface is glossy and reflective, with no visible dents or scratches. The overall appearance is clean, modern, and instantly recognizable as a soft drink container.
description: A tall, glossy red Coca-Cola can with white branding and a silver pull-tab top. The surface is smooth and undamaged, with clear logos and text.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large, white Coca-Cola script logo on a red background.
description_view_1: Back view displaying nutritional information, ingredients, and company details in white text.
description_view_2: Side view featuring the bold, vertical 'Coke' text and a barcode.
description_view_3: Opposite side with a partial view of the 'Coke' text and the white wave design.
attribute_label_or_branding: White Coca-Cola script logo, 'Coke' text, nutritional and company information, all on a red background with a white wave design.
